scripts.start:cf: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; ng build --watch --output-path dist/hnews-cf & wrangler pages dev dist/hnews-cf/browser --live-reload --port 8788
scripts.start:cf:offline: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; ng build --watch --output-path dist/hnews-cf & wrangler pages dev dist/hnews-cf/browser --port 8788
scripts.prestart:cf: BASE_URL=http://localhost:8788 npm run generate:version && BASE_URL=http://localhost:8788 npm run generate:userscript
scripts.prestart:cf:offline: BASE_URL=http://localhost:8788 npm run generate:version && BASE_URL=http://localhost:8788 npm run generate:userscript
scripts.prestart:gh: BASE_URL=http://localhost:4200 npm run generate:version && BASE_URL=http://localhost:4200 npm run generate:userscript
scripts.prebuild: npm run generate:version && npm run generate:userscript
scripts.prebuild:prod: npm run generate:version && npm run generate:userscript
scripts.prewatch: npm run generate:version && npm run generate:userscript
scripts.pretest: node ./scripts/clean-test-output.mjs && npm run generate:version && npm run generate:userscript
scripts.pretest:watch: node ./scripts/clean-test-output.mjs && npm run generate:version && npm run generate:userscript
scripts.pretest:coverage: node ./scripts/clean-test-output.mjs && npm run generate:version && npm run generate:userscript
scripts.pretest:coverage:watch: node ./scripts/clean-test-output.mjs && npm run generate:version && npm run generate:userscript
scripts.deploy:cf: npx ng build --configuration production --base-href "/" --output-path dist/hnews-cf && node ./scripts/patch-ngsw.mjs && wrangler pages deploy dist/hnews-cf/browser --project-name=hnews
scripts.e2e:pwa: npm run build:prod && if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Linux" ]; then xvfb-run -a playwright test --config e2e/playwright.pwa.config.ts; else playwright test --config e2e/playwright.pwa.config.ts; fi
scripts.e2e:gh: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4200 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND="npm run start:gh" playwright test
